subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses unto a people who recognize that there is none other God but Him. His is the sovereignty and creation, and all bow down before Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات لقوم یعرفون انه ما من اله الا هو له الامر و الخلق کل له خاضعون
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
